title: HighMod
description: HighMod is a early mod which adds custom dimensions , items, blocks, armour, custom entities and more! It doesn't require GeckoLib to load custom entities
body:
### ⚠️ WARNING: HIGHMOD IS STILL IN PRE-ALPHA STAGES, ANY ERRORS PLEASE REPORT ME
### THIS MOD IS DISCONTINUED AND WILL NOT UPDATE ### 📖 Introduction ---- HighMod is a mod that adds a lot of stuff, including custom items, dimensions and more! Here is an image to tell that all to you. ![You would get custom wood, armor , tools, block entities, and custom dimensions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec6ab847e73734c9b913f186feec3020614d589e.png)
### 🖼️ Screenshots

Inside the diamond dimension!!!

The dimension full of diamonds! Be sooo rich that you can flex them to your friends!

Inside the ruby dimension!!!

Full of rubies and you could pile 'em **as much as you want!

Let's get some protection with some Ruby Armour and some Saturation! Welcome to the ALMIGHTY Ruby Biome! **Want some ores? Here are some

✅ Compatibility

1. Roughly Enough Items / REI

📖 Installation & Required Mods

HighMod is very easy to install and it only requires a few mods. Here are the required mods
  • Fabric API
  • TerraBlender
